---
title: "R Code for Figures and Analyses"
---

This appendix lists the R source files used to produce some of the figures and
analyses in each chapter, with links to the source code on GitHub.

Files marked &#9888; do not yet have a descriptive title in their header.

## Chapter 3: Getting Started

- [Davis-reg.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/Davis-reg.R) &mdash; Davis data-- Models and plots
- [draft1970.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/draft1970.R) &mdash; 1970 Draft Lottery

## Chapter 4: Plots of Multivariate Data

- [Salaries-scatterplots.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/Salaries-scatterplots.R) &mdash; Salaries data: scatterplots
- [ellipses-coverage.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/ellipses-coverage.R) &mdash; demo ellipses of varying coverage
- [prestige.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/prestige/prestige.R) &mdash; Prestige data plots
- [peng-ggally.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/penguin/peng-ggally.R) &mdash; Penguin data, GGally ggpairs
- [peng-ggpcp.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/penguin/peng-ggpcp.R) &mdash; Penguin data, parallel coordinate plots

## Chapter 5: Dimension Reduction

- [workers-pca.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/workers-pca.R) &mdash; Workers data - pca
- [crime-ggbiplot.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/crime/crime-ggbiplot.R) &mdash; crime data - ggbiplot
- [diabetes-pca-tsne.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/diabetes/diabetes-pca-tsne.R) &mdash; Animate transition from PCA <--> tsne
- [outlier-demo.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/outlier-demo.R) &mdash; Demonstrate correlated data with 2 outliers

## Chapter 7: Plots for Univariate Response Models

- [dunc-conf-ellipse.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/Duncan/dunc-conf-ellipse.R) &mdash; Duncan data Confidence ellipse
- [hatvalues-demo.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/hatvalues-demo.R) &mdash; leverage and the data ellipse

## Chapter 8: Topics in Linear Models

- [dual-points-lines.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/dual-points-lines.R) &mdash; Illustrate dual points & lines
- [measerr-demo.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/measerr-demo.R) &mdash; Simulation for measurement error

## Chapter 9: Collinearity & Ridge Regression

- [collin-data-beta.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/collin-data-beta.R) &mdash; collinearity in data and beta space
- [cars-colldiag.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/cars-colldiag.R) &mdash; cars data - collinearity diagnostics examples
- [collin-centering.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/collin-centering.R) &mdash; demonstrate effect of centering
- [acetylene-colldiag.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/acetylene-colldiag.R) &mdash; Acetylene data
- [genridge-longley-figs1.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/genridge-longley-figs1.R) &mdash; Longley data-- generalized ridge trace plots
- [genridge-longley-figs2.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/genridge-longley-figs2.R) &mdash; Longley data-- generalized ridge trace plots

## Chapter 10: Hotelling's $T^2$

- [mathscore-figs.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/mathscore/mathscore-figs.R) &mdash; mathscore data
- [banknote.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/banknote.R) &mdash; banknote data

## Chapter 12: Visualizing Multivariate Models

- [dogfood-quartet.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/dogfood/dogfood-quartet.R) &mdash; dogfood quartet

## Chapter 14: Multivariate Influence and Robust Estimation

- [mvinfluence-Toy.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/mvinfluence-Toy.R) &mdash; toy example for multivariate influence
- [peng-manova.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/penguin/peng-manova.R) &mdash; Penguins MANOVA

## Appendix: Discriminant analysis

- [peng-lda-pred-new.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/penguin/peng-lda-pred-new.R) &mdash; Penguin prediction plots
- [iris-lda-ggplot.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/iris/iris-lda-ggplot.R) &mdash; plot LDA boundaries with ggplot
- [peng.lda.R](https://github.com/friendly/vis-MLM-book/blob/master/R/penguin/peng.lda.R) &mdash; Penguin data-- lda plots
